name: Top Movers S&P 500 Test
description: Test case for retrieving the top gaining or losing S&P 500 stocks through agent interaction

parts.text: What are today's top S&P 500 gainers?

Here are today's top S&P 500 gainers:

The list shows S&P 500 stocks with the largest percentage gains today. Each entry includes the ticker symbol, company name, current price, and percentage change. These are the strongest upward movers among S&P 500 components as of the latest market data.

**Note:** This is read-only market data. No orders were placed.
